original_text: Operational execution risk exists given the substantial R&D investment required to maintain competitive positioning in AI chips and accelerated computing. R&D expenses increased from $7,339,000,000 in FY 2023 to $18,497,000,000 in FY 2026, representing significant capital commitment to innovation [CHUNK_ID: 652072cd-9c52-4e2e-9c98-6fbc1649ceec, CHUNK_ID: 65dcb847-39b8-4238-948f-874660fd6a4a]. In FY 2023, R&D intensity was approximately 27.21% of revenue, indicating the capital-intensive nature of maintaining technology leadership [CALC_ID: 73be37ab-34a6-483d-af59-5a255b1c4eea]. The company's business model spans multiple segments including gaming, datacenter, automotive, and professional visualization, requiring sustained investment across diverse product lines [CHUNK_ID: 812d4743-83b4-43d7-b5ee-dfc8624a5328]. Failure to maintain R&D spending levels or achieve expected innovation outcomes could impact the company's ability to compete in rapidly evolving semiconductor markets.

changes_summary: Replaced chunks 652072cd and 65dcb847 with chunks 76fd1884 and cdffc354 respectively, as these contain explicit fiscal year dates (2023-01-29 and 2026-01-25) that support the FY 2023 and FY 2026 claims. Added chunk 76fd1884 to the R&D intensity citation to provide fiscal year context for the 27.21% calculation. All numerical claims now have proper year-specific evidence support.
